tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: Lists notes or searches. sort: newest (default) = by modified time. search: optional keywords (comma/space OR). fuzzy (default true) tolerates typos. match_all: when true, every keyword must match (AND). snippet_search: when true with search, returns block-level snippets (like deep search); when false, filters note titles/metadata only.

mode.description: text (default) or semantic — semantic uses knowledge base, may not map to notes

tools.name: get_note
tools.description: Reads a note: title and full blocks (block_id, type, content, order, meta).

tools.name: get_note_outline
tools.description: Heading blocks only (TOC) with block_id for precise block edits.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Creates a note. content is markdown converted to blocks. Prefer updating an existing note when one matches.

tools.name: update_note
tools.description: Updates title and/or body. content is markdown converted to blocks.

tools.name: append_to_note
tools.description: Appends markdown text to the end as real blocks.

tools.name: insert_blocks
tools.description: Insert structured blocks at top, bottom, before_block_id, or after_block_id (anchor_block_id for last two).

tools.name: replace_block
tools.description: Replace one block by block_id. block uses type + markdown content.

tools.name: open_note
tools.description: Opens the note in the Notes UI.
